creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

attached is the shar file for the Python package py-pynxos, a Python client for managing Cisco NX-OS devices through NX-API.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 and py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK

Note:
~~~~~
- security/py-scp must be commited beforehand (see PR #224423: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=224423)
- the package has at the moment no known license.

--
Cheers
Kai
